Races and classes use active Loadouts unlocks from Resources/Achievements/AchievementsClient.txt; Drakkin exists in the raw files but is inactive and visibility-gated.
The Legends level cap is 50, extracted from the highest Meet or Exceed the Level Cap component in Resources/Achievements/AchievementComponentsClient.txt.

Race descriptions and summary abilities are extracted from eqstr_us.txt. Structured racial traits prefer local client descriptions and executable strings, with EQL Wiki Character_Races used as fallback where the local files do not expose explicit mechanics.

Stances and invocations are switchable modes from eqstr_us.txt client strings, with descriptions extracted from eqgame.exe printable strings. No finer class-specific mode availability table was found in the text data.
Spell availability is extracted from class level columns 36-51 in spells_us.txt, descriptions from dbstr_us.txt type 6, messages from spells_us_str.txt, and effects from spells_us.txt column 172.

Skill availability and caps are extracted from Resources/skillcaps.txt and capped at the Legends level cap. Known activated skill descriptions are extracted from eqgame.exe printable strings; Smite and Reave are derived Legends abilities paired to Lay Hands and Harm Touch because the client strings expose ability text without separate skillcap rows.

Alternate Advancement availability and costs are extracted from the vendored EQL Wiki Alternate Advancement snapshot revision 151303. Descriptions and rank spell metadata are enriched from local Legends dbstr_us.txt and spells_us.txt files.
